*************SNF Pricer Return Codes********* 

*******************TOB 21X******************* 

SNF payment return codes: 

00 = RUG III group rate returned 

SNF Error return codes: 

20 = Bad RUG code 
30 = Bad MSA code 
40 = Thru date < July 1, 1998, or 
invalid
